User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the JTMK+ system, either a student or an admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity, matches Firebase Auth UID.

role.description: Role of the user (e.g., student, admin).

course.description: The course the student is enrolled in.

Program.title: Program
Program.description: Represents a JTMK program or event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the program entity.

briefDescription.description: A short, one-sentence description for program previews.

description.description: A long, detailed description of the program.

startDate.description: Start date and time of the program.

endDate.description: End date and time of the program.

imageUrl.description: URL of the program's poster image.

qrCodeUrl.description: URL of the generated QR code for program registration.

ActivityEvidence.title: ActivityEvidence
ActivityEvidence.description: Represents the evidence of activity submitted by a user for a program.

id.description: Unique identifier for the evidence record.

user_id.description: Reference to the User who submitted the evidence.

studentName.description: Denormalized name of the student for easy display.

submissionDate.description: Date and time of evidence submission.

image_url.description: URL of the uploaded activity evidence (image).

Certificate.title: Certificate
Certificate.description: Represents a digital certificate issued to a user for a program.

user_id.description: Reference to the User who received the certificate.

programname.description: The name of the program for which the certificate was issued.

issuedate.description: The date the certificate was issued.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Represents a user's attendance record for a program, captured via QR scan.

attendance_id.description: Unique identifier for the attendance record.

scan_time.description: The timestamp when the user scanned the QR code.

definition.description: Stores publicly-readable program and event details.
Stores user-submitted evidence for program participation. Nested under the user to enforce ownership and simplify security rules.
Stores certificates issued to a specific user. Nested under the user to ensure privacy and ownership.
Stores attendance records for a specific user. Nested under the user to ensure privacy and ownership.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed with a user-centric security model. User-specific data (evidence, certificates, attendance) is nested within that user's document path. This simplifies security rules by allowing path-based ownership checks, which is more secure and efficient than filtering in rules. Public data like Programs is kept in a top-level collection for easy access by all users.
